summary.en: Search contacts by text, optional tag, with paging.
summary.zh_CN: 按文本、可选标签搜索联系人，支持分页。

scenarios.title: Link customer primary contact after contact.create
scenarios.description: Sales creates a contact, then sets customer.primaryContactId to that contact.

scenarios.title: Supplier master references procurement contact
scenarios.description: Procurement maintains supplier.primaryContactId pointing to contact.get.

scenarios.title: Contact fields in audit trail are minimized
scenarios.description: Platform logs contactId and action, not full phone/email body in default audit events.

scenarios.title: Anonymous contact.search throttled
scenarios.description: Unauthenticated callers receive 429 after sustained search volume.
